main.description: Import a repository from a CAR file. Verifies record CID integrity and re-signs with the destination service key. The caller must be enrolled as the DID in the CAR's commit block.

errors.name: InvalidCar
errors.description: The CAR file is malformed, has missing blocks, or contains records with mismatched CIDs.

errors.name: RepoAlreadyExists
errors.description: The destination already has records for this DID. Import is only supported for empty repos.
